title: Daily Briefing — Apr 15
headline: Tech surges, but the rotation is getting spicy — patience, react, don't chase.
body: Right, so today's market is all about big tech ripping higher: NVDA up 3.8%, GOOGL +3.6%, META +4.4%, AMZN +3.8%. SPY and QQQ are pushing well above their respective 20 MAs (SPY at $694.46 vs SMA20 $660.36, QQQ at $628.60 vs SMA20 $591.08) — that's bullish momentum, but it's feeling a bit stretched at these levels. VIX is behaving nicely (18.37, well below its 20-day MA), and Fear & Greed is back to neutral (49), so no crowding at either extreme.

Sector-wise, XLK (technology) and XLC (communication) are still the leaders, but keep your eye on rotation — XLY (discretionary) and XLF (financials) are 'improving,' while energy (XLE), materials (XLB), and utilities (XLU) are 'weakening' despite elevated risk tags. Healthcare and staples are lagging hard, so defensive stuff is being left behind as the crowd piles into the growth trade.

Contrarian warning: whenever you see all the mega-cap tech names racing way above their 20 MAs with sector breadth narrowing, that's a classic setup for cracks to emerge if something spooks bonds or flows shift. Remember — less trades = more wins. No critical rule triggers (no dark pool signal, bonds stable, sentiment not extreme), so we stay patient and let price tell the story. Abundance mindset; if you missed the entry, don't chase — next setup always comes.
callout_body:
SPY: $694.46 (watch for daily close above $660.36 SMA20)
QQQ: $628.60 (key is $591.08 SMA20)
NVDA: $196.51 (approaching, above $178.54 SMA20)
XLK: $147.94 (watch mean reversion zone: $137.41 SMA20)
XLE: $55.95 (weakening, below $59.29 SMA20)
HYG: $80.50 (bull bias, no breakdown — risk stable)
action_items: Monitor SPY and QQQ for any reversal signals — daily closes below 20 MA = exit long per rule R006.
Watch XLE and XLU for further sector weakness — avoid new exposure until momentum improves.
closing_quote: If it's in the press, it's in the price. Abundance mindset — the next trade is always on deck.
